creator: prox@prolixium.com
text:
This happens with zebra-0.95a, too, same thing:

Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
fault virtual address   = 0x78
fault code              = supervisor read, page not present
instruction pointer     = 0x20:0xc0555579
stack pointer           = 0x28:0xdea4ba64
frame pointer           = 0x28:0xdea4ba68
code segment            = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
                        = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
processor eflags        = resume, IOPL = 0
current process         = 9454 (zebra)
trap number             = 12
panic: page fault

- Mark

-- 
Mark Kamichoff
prox@prolixium.com

Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute, Class of 2004
